Q4 Counterfactual (N2 delay changed to 0 steps): N2 receives at T=0 and forwards instantly (0-step delay), so N4 receives from N2 at T=0. N3 still has a 1-step delay, so N4 receives from N3 at T=1. N4 activates when the second message arrives, which is T=1.
